title: Otites muradicus
taxonomy: Otites muradicus is classified as a species of fungus in the genus Otites, which belongs to the family Otidiaceae. This fungus is a type of ascomycete, a group of fungi characterized by the production of ascospores. The Otites muradicus is further classified as a species of fungus, specifically as Otites muradicus is an anamorphic fungus. The exact classification of this fungus may be subject to change as new research emerges. Further studies are required to determine the exact taxonomy of Otites muradicus.
